texto: there was a time when this home was her domain. Sometimes she felt proud of it, sometimes she felt tied to it, but whether it was a burden or a blessing, it was hers to keep. She’d known better than anyone what this house needed; lately it’d become one of the few aspects of her life she could control. there is no corner, no ridge along the steps or crack along the wall, that she doesn’t know like her own body. the house may never have been the sanctuary she’d always dreamed of, but at least it carried no surprises. It was comfortable.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Natalia Sylvester: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “there was a time when this home was her domain. Sometimes she felt proud of it, sometimes she fel…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, control, home pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de home.
